title: Class 2 caregiver confirmation doorlock-sensitive scenario
description: Deterministic scenario skeleton for a doorlock-sensitive or visitor-response-sensitive request that must enter Class 2 caregiver confirmation rather than autonomous Class 1 execution. Doorbell context is not unlock authorization, and caregiver confirmation is not validator approval.

steps.description: Publish visitor-response context or doorlock-sensitive intent evidence through the registry-aligned context input plane. doorbell_detected may be true, but it is not door unlock authorization.
Route the sensitive request to Class 2 notification / caregiver confirmation rather than autonomous Class 1 execution.
Publish Class 2 notification for the doorlock-sensitive case. The notification describes the manual confirmation path but is not actuation authority.
If clarification interaction is used before caregiver decision, publish the interaction artifact to safe_deferral/clarification/interaction. This artifact must not authorize doorlock control.
Collect caregiver confirmation through the governed manual confirmation path. Caregiver confirmation is a separate governed path and not autonomous Class 1 validator approval.
If any governed manual doorlock action is executed outside the current Class 1 baseline, ACK and audit must be captured. The scenario does not expand the autonomous low-risk catalog.

transition_outcomes.condition: Doorlock-sensitive or visitor-response-sensitive request requires governed caregiver confirmation.
Caregiver response is absent, denied, ambiguous, or cannot be verified.

notes: doorbell_detected is visitor-response context and not door unlock authorization.
Doorlock is not part of the current autonomous Class 1 low-risk catalog.
Class 2 notification and clarification interaction payloads do not authorize doorlock control.
Caregiver confirmation belongs to a separately governed manual path and must be audit-visible.
ACK is required if a governed manual doorlock action is executed outside the current Class 1 baseline.
